steps.description: Data were normalized normalized with the Expression Console Software version 1.1 from Affymetrix using Robust Multi-array Average (RMA) algorithm.

MEV software was used to select differentially expressed genes by applying the following criteria: (a) Absolute value of the group mean difference greater than 1.5, and (b) p value smaller than 0.05 (Welch's t test)

raw_text: Data were normalized normalized with the Expression Console Software  version 1.1 from Affymetrix using Robust Multi-array Average (RMA) algorithm. MEV software was used to select differentially expressed genes by applying the following criteria: (a) Absolute value of the group mean difference greater than 1.5, and (b) p value smaller than 0.05 (Welch's t test)
